title: Kimi K2.7 Code is generally available in GitHub Copilot
abstract: Kimi K2.7 code is now Generally Available (GA), offering enhanced features and improved performance for developers, ensuring a seamless integration into your existing workflows.
abstract_zh: 嘿哥们儿，新出的Kimi K2.7代码终于正式可用啦！不仅功能更强大、性能更好，还能无缝融入你的开发流程里。赶紧让我的小助手带你飞吧，不然你家项目又要卡在瓶颈上了！
